title: Shattering Russian Flour Blini
description: A classic Russian dish featuring thin, sour pancakes made from flour, water, and yeast. Serve with your favorite toppings for a romantic breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Combine 1 cup of warm water with yeast in a large mixing bowl, let sit for 5 minutes to activate the yeast.
In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and salt.
Gradually add dry ingredients to the yeast mixture, stirring until a smooth batter forms.
Let the batter rest in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Using a ladle, pour a small amount of batter onto the skillet and tilt to evenly coat the surface.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to curl.
Loosen the blini with a spatula and flip to cook the other side for another minute.
Repeat with remaining batter, until all blini are cooked.
Serve warm, topped with your favorite fillings such as sour cream, jam, or caviar.
